content:
# Session 11 (iter-011) — Grassmannian properties: separated → proper

## Metadata
- ONE prover lane: `Functors.lean` (mathlib-build). Targets: `grassmannian_separated`, `grassmannian_proper`.
- Basic.lean read-only this iter (no cross-S work; adapter still gap — matches plan).
- Sorry (Functors, genuine bodies): lane went 2 → 3 (net +1) but with substantial real proof content
  (4 axiom-clean new lemmas + the separated reduction + 3 properness instances). Project strictly ahead.
- Axioms: every new proven decl ⊆ `{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}` (2 verified via `lean_verify`).
  No `axiom`, no errors, file green (sorry warnings only).

## Target: `grassmannian_separated` — PARTIAL (own sorry removed; 1 isolated dependency sorry)
- **Reduction PROVEN.** `structureMorphism = terminal.from _`, so `IsSeparated (structureMorphism)`
  follows from `(grassmannianScheme r d).IsSeparated`. Final form:
  `unfold grassmannianScheme.structureMorphism; exact Scheme.IsSeparated.isSeparated_terminal_from`
  off a `haveI` of `grassmannianScheme_isSeparated`. The theorem carries **no own sorry**.
  (An earlier `exact` before `unfold` failed — the unfold was required.)
- **Algebraic core PROVEN, axiom-clean** — the mathematical heart of `lem:grassmannian-separated`:
  - `grassTransAux_minor_self_mul` (~1235): `algebraMap(P^I_J) · θ_{I,J}(P^J_I) = 1`, i.e.
    `θ_{I,J}(P^J_I) = (P^I_J)⁻¹`. Via `grassTransAux_minor` (K=I) + `grassMinor_self` +
    `grassMinorMatrixLoc_det` + `Ring.mul_inverse_cancel`.
  - `grassDiagRing_surjective` (~1252): every `z ∈ ℤ[X^I,1/P^I_J]` equals `algebraMap(a)·θ_{I,J}(P^J_I)ⁿ`
    — surjectivity of the diagonal ring map `ℤ[X^I] ⊗_ℤ ℤ[X^J] → ℤ[X^I,1/P^I_J]`, **stated without
    naming the tensor** (to dodge the ℤ diamond). Via `IsLocalization.Away.surj` + the lemma above.
- **Isolated sorry:** `grassmannianScheme_isSeparated` (~1270). `rw [Scheme.isSeparated_iff,
  AlgebraicGeometry.isSeparated_iff]` reduces (compiles) to
  `IsClosedImmersion (pullback.diagonal (terminal.from X))`; the diagonal-closed-immersion step is the
  single sorry. **Two named blockers:**
  1. Mathlib has **no** `Scheme.GlueData → IsSeparated`; the cover criterion
     `isClosedImmersion_diagonal_restrict_diagonalCoverDiagonalRange` only covers the *diagonal* blocks
     `U^I ×_⊤ U^I` (`diagonalCoverDiagonalRange` = ⋃_j the (j,j) ranges, NOT ⊤ for I≠J). Off-diagonal
     `U^I ×_⊤ U^J` must be hand-assembled via `IsZariskiLocalAtTarget @IsClosedImmersion`.
  2. **`⊗[ℤ]` module diamond.** Naming `ℤ[X^I] ⊗_ℤ ℤ[X^J]` fails — the tensor `Semiring` instance does
     NOT synthesise for base `ℤ` (`Algebra ℤ` module vs `AddCommGroup.intModule`). Confirmed: isolated
     `example : Semiring (MvPolynomial _ ℤ ⊗[ℤ] _)` **fails** while `example : Algebra ℤ (MvPolynomial _ ℤ)`
     **succeeds**; `⊗[MvPolynomial …]` (used in `grassTripleRingEquiv`) works fine. A `haveI :
     IsScalarTower ℤ ℤ _ := IsScalarTower.left ℤ` attempt on `grassDiagRingHom` did not clear it; the
     map was ultimately stated surjectivity-only without naming the tensor.

## Target: `grassmannian_proper` — PARTIAL (3 instances landed; 2 sorries remain)
- **Landed, axiom-clean:**
  - `grassmannianScheme_compactSpace` (~1296) — `(grassGlueData r d).openCover.compactSpace`; finite
    index `ULift (Fin d ↪ Fin r)` + per-chart affine ⇒ compact. (`lean_verify` clean.)
  - `grassmannian_structureMorphism_quasiCompact` (~1310) — `← compactSpace_iff_quasiCompact`. (`lean_verify` clean.)
  - `grassmannian_structureMorphism_quasiSeparated` (~1318) — `IsSeparated.instQuasiSeparated` (genuine,
    but transitively rests on the separated sorry).
- **Remaining sorries** (body now `refine valuativeCriterion_proper _ ?_` after a `haveI`):
  - `LocallyOfFiniteType` (~1336): each chart `Spec ℤ[X^I]` is finite type over ℤ. Friction: `⊤_ Scheme`
    is only iso (not defeq) to `Spec ℤ`, so `terminal.from (Spec A)` is not literally `Spec.map`.
  - `ValuativeCriterion` (~1339): the deep Nitsure DVR lifting argument (verbatim source quote in
    `Functors.tex`) — substantial, multi-step.

## Untouched (correct): gap-blocked downstream
`grassmannianUniversalQuotient`, `grassmannian_very_ample`, `grassmannian_represents` — need
`IsLocallyFreeOfRank`/`det`(=⋀ᵈ) stubs + glued functor-of-points. Not this lane (per PROGRESS).

## Key findings / patterns
- **State surjectivity, not the ring map, to dodge the ℤ tensor diamond.** The algebraic content of a
  closed-immersion-of-Spec argument can be fully proven as a surjectivity statement over the *target*
  localization, sidestepping the un-synthesisable `⊗[ℤ]` `Semiring` instance entirely.
- **`θ_{I,J}(P^J_I) = (P^I_J)⁻¹`** is the reusable bridge: `grassTransAux_minor` (diagonal case K=I) +
  `Ring.mul_inverse_cancel` on the `IsUnit` determinant.
- **`diagonalCoverDiagonalRange` only spans diagonal blocks** — it is NOT ⊤ over a product cover with
  distinct charts; off-diagonal closed immersions are a separate hand-assembly. (KB.)
- **Separated→quasi-separated is free** via `IsSeparated.instQuasiSeparated`; **compact glued scheme**
  via `OpenCover.compactSpace` (needs `Finite` index + per-chart `CompactSpace`).

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- None. All 6 new decls are genuine project proofs (no Mathlib re-export ⇒ no `\mathlibok`); none yet
  blueprinted (coverage debt → recommendations). No `\lean{…}` rename flagged. No stale `\notready`.
- `\leanok` verdicts left to `sync_leanok` (iter=11, sha 8867380, +29/−0): correct. Statement blocks of
  `lem:grassmannian-separated` / `lem:grassmannian-proper` carry `\leanok` (declarations exist) — right.
  Both **proof** blocks are correctly left UNmarked (separated rests on a dependency sorry; proper has 2
  own sorries). No override needed.

## Process notes (LOW)
- Off-by-one (5th consecutive): prover labelled the round "iter-011" correctly this time in task notes,
  but earlier auto-memory edits are cosmetic; memory is outside review write-domain.
- Prover briefly wrote a memory file under a misplaced in-project `.claude-2leheng/` tree, then `rm -rf`'d
  it; the canonical memory at the user path is intact. No code impact.

## Recommendations (see recommendations.md)
P1: blueprint the 6 unmatched helpers; DECIDE not to re-dispatch separated blind (needs design). P1:
continue proper (LocallyOfFiniteType is the cheaper of the two). Consider enabling `mathlib-analogist`
for the `⊗[ℤ]` diamond / `GlueData→IsSeparated` design.
